title: genista patula var. antiochia
intro: Genista patula var. antiochia, also known as Spiny broom, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant effects. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of tincture or extract for its medicinal properties.
